$comment: SOT for all Clinic-OS skills. Managed in master, deployed via core:push. /help reads this file and filters by context.

skills.name: Skill Guide
skills.description: List available skills + intent-based recommendations

skills.name: Session Recorder
skills.description: Cross-session work continuity — progress, issues, and next steps

skills.name: Onboarding
skills.description: Clinic customization setup (33 features, 5-tier progression)

skills.name: Clinic Basic Info Setup
skills.description: Name, contact, address, hours — auto-mapped from Place data + clinics↔site_settings dual-write sync

skills.name: Naver Content Extraction
skills.description: Auto-import content + images from Naver Blog/Place

skills.name: Image Curation
skills.description: Classify collected images by category + generate asset-metadata.json

skills.name: Content Analysis + Persona
skills.description: Extract blog keywords, tone & manner, author persona → style-card.yaml

skills.name: Strength Discovery + Positioning
skills.description: Identify clinic differentiators, target patients, core messaging → edge-profile.yaml

skills.name: Marketing Copy Writing
skills.description: Write marketing copy for homepage, programs, and blog

skills.name: Blog Post Writing
skills.description: Persona-based blog writing — in the doctor's voice

skills.name: Medical Advertising Compliance Review
skills.description: Review copy/blog against medical advertising regulations (BLOCK/WARN/PASS). Auto-triggered by write-copy, setup-programs, write-blog.

skills.name: UI/UX Quality Review
skills.description: Visual quality audit — btn--primary consistency, TW4 variable resolution, contrast ratio, broken images, clinics↔site_settings sync, mobile layout. Playwright-based.

skills.name: Reference Site Collection
skills.description: Fetch and analyze external reference websites (competitors, existing site, design inspiration) for pipeline enrichment

skills.name: Web Content Planning
skills.description: Plan site/programs/blog/landing content → site-plan.yaml

skills.name: Homepage Setup (Data)
skills.description: Select preset + populate content data

skills.name: Frontend Code Implementation
skills.description: Reference-based design extraction + Astro/Tailwind coding + custom skins

skills.name: Program Page Setup
skills.description: Register treatment programs + medical staff in DB

skills.name: Skin/Theme Application
skills.description: Choose from 9 built-in skins + configure brand colors

skills.name: Doctor Portrait Enhancement
skills.description: Enhance/process doctor profile photos via Nanobanana (Gemini)

skills.name: Scene Image Generation
skills.description: Generate treatment/facility scene images via Nanobanana (Gemini)

skills.name: Plugin Management
skills.description: Create/install/edit/test/deploy plugins

skills.name: Survey Tool Management
skills.description: Create/edit/deploy survey and self-assessment tools

skills.name: System Dashboard
skills.description: At-a-glance view of version, health, git, and DB status

skills.name: Infrastructure Check
skills.description: Detailed inspection of D1, R2, Workers, and Cloudflare auth

skills.name: Codebase Navigator
skills.description: Find files, understand systems, check safety, discover docs — replaces support bot

skills.name: Protection Rules Check
skills.description: Verify file protection rules sync status

skills.name: Core Update
skills.description: Apply latest core version + resolve conflicts + deploy

skills.name: Update Simulation
skills.description: Core update dry-run — preview conflicts before applying

skills.name: Troubleshooting Assistant
skills.description: Systematic diagnosis + auto-repair for build/deploy/runtime errors

skills.name: Sample Data Cleanup
skills.description: Remove seed/sample data (is_sample=1, sample-* slugs) safely

skills.name: OG Image + Social Meta
skills.description: Generate/select OG image and configure social sharing meta tags

skills.name: Live Demo Build
skills.description: Reusable live webinar demo — pre-stage infrastructure, run skill pipeline live, handoff after

skills.name: Release Pipeline
skills.description: 7-stage release — version bump, core push, HQ deploy, client update

skills.name: Release Notes Generator
skills.description: Auto-generate release notes from git log

skills.name: HQ Guide Sync
skills.description: Build & deploy docs/*.md → HQ D1 guides

skills.name: HQ D1 Management
skills.description: Query/modify HQ database (clients, channels, guides)

skills.name: Remote Client Diagnosis
skills.description: Remote diagnosis of client sites (HQ + cos-ask)

skills.name: Marketing Dispatch Management
skills.description: Track marketing content dispatch to community/group chat/LiveKlass

skills.name: Issue Collection + Core Integration
skills.description: Collect client/internal issues → track core integration

skills.name: Audit Report
skills.description: Auto-generate code/security/performance audit reports

skills.name: Improvement Tracker
skills.description: Track and prioritize improvements discovered from audits

skills.name: Business Advisor
skills.description: Data-driven business advice — connects dashboard, patients, revenue, reservations

skills.name: Patient Segmentation
skills.description: Segment patients by behavior — active, at-risk, high-value, program-specific

skills.name: Patient Campaign Drafting
skills.description: Draft segment-targeted campaigns — win-back, follow-up, seasonal, events

skills.name: Monthly Business Report
skills.description: Auto-generate monthly report — revenue, patients, reservations, trends

skills.name: Patient Reminder
skills.description: Appointment reminders, follow-ups, recall — via SMS/KakaoTalk

skills.name: AEO/SEO Optimization
skills.description: AI search optimization + SEO configuration (master/local routing)

skills.name: Skin Development Partner
skills.description: Custom skin development with design system + TW4 safe-selector validation + /review-ux auto-gate

skills.name: Survey Tool Development Partner
skills.description: Custom survey/assessment tool design and implementation

skills.name: Plugin Development Partner
skills.description: Custom plugin design and implementation

skills.name: Intake Form Setup
skills.description: Patient intake form template configuration and activation

skills.name: Notification Channel Setup
skills.description: SMS/KakaoTalk notification channel and template configuration

skills.name: External Lead Channel Integration
skills.description: Connect Kakao Talk, Naver TalkTalk, Naver Reservation email for external lead capture

skills.name: Multilingual Configuration
skills.description: Multi-language support and translation configuration

skills.name: Data Import
skills.description: Legacy system data migration (CSV, Excel, external DB)

skills.name: FAQ Generator
skills.description: Auto-generate FAQs from clinic data, programs, and patient patterns

skills.name: Social Proof Curation
skills.description: Collect, anonymize, and place patient reviews as social proof

skills.name: Product Direction Review
skills.description: Evaluate changes against SOUL.md — purpose alignment, axis check, vanilla test

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Security, bugs, logic errors, protection rule compliance — confidence-based

skills.name: Build Verification & QA
skills.description: Build, test, DB schema, deploy-guard, health — end-to-end verification

skills.name: Marketing Campaign Planning
skills.description: Funnel design, timeline, channel strategy, messaging hierarchy

skills.name: Marketing Copy Drafting
skills.description: Announcements, reminders, recaps — matched to established workshop tone and voice

skills.name: Campaign Performance Analysis
skills.description: Funnel metrics, channel effectiveness, comparative analysis

skills.name: Workshop Curriculum Planning
skills.description: Curriculum design, skill-to-session mapping, materials checklist

skills.name: Workshop Retrospective
skills.description: Post-workshop review — Keep/Stop/Start/Improve + skill impact assessment

skills.name: setup-favicon
skills.description: Favicon Generation & Setup

skills.name: Tacit Product Knowledge Extraction
skills.description: Extract practitioner's implicit product knowledge via 7-axis interview (definition, clinical philosophy, personalization, positioning, communication, evolution, productization). Output: tacit-product.yaml. Tier 4-5 only.

skills.name: Program Alignment Verification
skills.description: Verify program/content alignment with tacit-product.yaml (7-axis). Detect drift, suggest fixes. Output: alignment-report.yaml. Run monthly or post-tacit-update.

onboarding.description: Full onboarding flow for new clinics

content-strategy.description: Deep content strategy — tacit knowledge extraction and alignment verification
